education.title: What Is Constitution?
education.subtitle: In Traditional Chinese Medicine, your constitution is the key to understanding your body

constitution.definition: Your constitution is the comprehensive, relatively stable set of inherent traits — encompassing your physique, physiological tendencies, psychological patterns, and adaptive capacity — shaped by both your innate nature and life experience.

classification.definition: Through systematic analysis of individual differences across populations, TCM identifies 9 fundamental constitution types — each with distinct physical, emotional, and environmental characteristics.

differentiation.definition: By understanding your unique constitutional pattern, we can identify your body's tendencies and individual differences — laying the foundation for personalized wellness guidance.

biased.definition: Most people have one or more "biased" constitutions — tendencies that deviate from perfect balance. Knowing yours is the first step toward a lifestyle that works with your body, not against it.

disclaimer.banner: Qiora provides wellness and lifestyle insights based on Traditional Chinese Medicine concepts. This is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical concerns.
disclaimer.footer: This information is for educational purposes only.
disclaimer.emergency: You've described something that may require immediate medical attention. If you're experiencing a medical emergency, please call 911. For mental health crises, call 988.
